name: the-bond-book-everything-investors-need-to-know-about-treasuries-munis-corporate-bonds-and-more
description: Annette Thau's comprehensive guide to bond investing — covering Treasuries, municipals, corporates, MBS, zeros, bond funds, and portfolio strategies.
useCase: Understand bond investing — from bond basics and pricing to building a diversified fixed-income portfolio with individual bonds or funds.
knownRisks: Bond market conditions change — yields and prices are dynamic
Tax treatment varies by jurisdiction and individual circumstances
Calls and early redemptions can disrupt ladder strategies
